DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS EXTRA SPACE MANAGEMENT, INC. and EXTRA SPACE STORAGE, INC.'S DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires a meet and confer "in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. Both sides are ordered to comply with the law. Defendants' response to the complaint is now due by March 21, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

DEFENDANTS EXTRA SPACE MANAGEMENT, INC. and EXTRA SPACE STORAGE, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 435.5, which requires a meet and confer "in person or by telephone" before a motion to strike is filed. Both sides are ordered to comply with the law. Defendants' response to the complaint is now due by March 21, 2022.
